evidence: We are increasingly incorporating AI capabilities into many of our products to enable our customers to become more agile and productive.
We also use AI tools internally to make certain business processes more efficient.
This includes the growing emphasis on AI-driven transformation across our customers teams, operations, and processes. A product data foundation is the backbone of AI-driven transformation.

statements about our anticipated financial results...our artificial intelligence initiatives...and the development of our products

our AI-based solutions could produce inaccurate results or have other unintended consequences, or...may expose us to lawsuits, regulatory investigations, or other proceedings, and subject us to legal liability

limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI spend, headcount, or named vendor/cloud/chip partnerships disclosed in the excerpts; only generic statements about incorporating AI into products and internal use.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI use cases are named at a category level (PLM/Windchill product suite, internal process efficiency) but no deployment metrics, production status details, or quantified results are provided; score reflects named initiatives without deployment confirmation.
capex_mentions: No dollar amounts or quantified AI/compute investment figures appear in the excerpts.
